reviews.review_description: The game barely functions you can be hit by things no where near you the block is completely pointless it does not work what so ever damage is reallyyy inconsistent I could take someone down with one punch then the next guy is quite literally immortal missing 3/4ths of his head and is still walking around and cant be stunned or knocked down by anything wepons included none of the reviews that are 4 or 5 star talk about game play what so ever so hard to belive they are real
This game is great and all just like the pc and console version but we need multiplayer and player made maps and I would like you to add more modifiers in the scenarios mode please and thank you😁

The game is fun, the blood and the amazing pixels. Maybe they should add more levels but right now it's amazing, you can play player made levels if you connect to pcvr and it could never get boring. It's hard to find good games at the moment and this is so different from anything else though it is older than newer games. Though it is single player it's still fun and you can have teammates. Maybe not in the normal levels like saloon, prison etc. But i have not found a better game since i found this. Though it's a lot of money it was worth every cent.
This game is very awesome and very cool but devs if u decide to have an update add a throwing mechanism so the game would be 10 times better ￼
THIS GAME IS AMAZING ABSOLUTELY AWESOME

reviews.review_title: Yes. I painted the town red
reviews.review_description:
This is single handily one of the best games I’ve played. Mainly because you don’t have to unlock modifiers. But you absolutely dominate every single enemy. And this game insures nothing will stop you from it.

Edit: this game could make you rage. So if you have anger issues, maybe stick to sandbox mode

Although this game is a little janky and lags sometimes it’s still exhilarating. The game came out barely 90 minutes ago and I already know I’m gonna have a lot more fun. Give the devs time to work out the bugs and I promise you will love this game. Side note, WHAT HAPPENED TO THE NAKED MAN HE WAS IN EVERY LEVEL IN THE ORIGINAL GAME

I like the gameplay￼, the graphics, and the violence￼. But the one thing that would make the game better, if the developers to add level editor into the quest 3S. I’m not saying the game is trash, but I’m saying the game is￼ fascinating, but it gets boring after a while. That’s because there’s only 5 levels in the game. 3 actual levels, and and 2 similar levels, but the only difference is the time of day. So if level editor makes it to the quest 3S, I lose interest in the game ￼￼unless level editor is added. So please add level editor to the quest 3S, ￼ so I won’t lose interest in the game.

I thought this was going to be a fun game with a little more complexity than what it is. It's a beat em up with no objective, goal or progression. You just choose a stage and free for all it with NPCs. That's all it is.  I'm not sure how it's getting good ratings because it's absolutely boring.
